completion: A versioned visual-system contract selects Miro object types by information function and defines a canonical narrative board architecture.
A deterministic quality gate evaluates information architecture, hierarchy, density, object semantics, colour roles, connector discipline and evidence separation instead of relying on object counts.
A compact reference renderer creates a new Education-team Miro board that passes the v2 gate and remote readback.
Schauwerk tests, CI, documentation, diff-bound review and live evidence are merged and the Bureau task is verified.
goal: Replace technically successful but visually weak Miro layouts with a research-backed, semantic and narrative visual system that produces clear, dense, concise and coherent Schauwerke.

completion_non_claims: automatic aesthetic acceptance from a score

lifecycle.completion_reason: The single vertical task is verified with merged implementation, green CI, exact Miro conformance and a separately bound visual review.

metadata.problem_statement: The existing 92/100 Miro quality receipt proved technical structure but failed the user's direct visual-quality review.
metadata.source_request: alles umsetzen: plan erstellen, registrieren und gleich umsetzen in einem rutsch

title: Schauwerk Visual System v2
